context: The response should exercise the `implement-slice` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: implements_single_slice
checklist.description: Keeps work scoped to the single slice and its success criteria.

checklist.name: uses_tests_and_signal
checklist.description: Runs unit tests and the slice Signal validation, not just static edits.

checklist.name: iterates_bounded
checklist.description: Iterates on failures up to a bounded maximum rather than looping forever.

checklist.name: reports_failure_honestly
checklist.description: Reports failure with evidence if Signal cannot be satisfied.
